judge_reason: Description A states the FBI stamp is in the upper right corner and provides no legible text, while Description B places it at the top center and quotes multiple specific, legible lines of text, creating a direct contradiction on both location and verbatim content.
original_image_tags: A single, aged document page with a beige or off-white background. A blue ink stamp in the upper right corner indicates receipt by the FBI. Centered on the page is a large, faint, rectangular impression of handwritten text that appears to be a transfer or bleed-through from another document. The handwriting is in cursive script but is largely illegible due to its faintness and the texture of the paper. The page shows signs of age, including some discoloration and small dark spots or holes near the bottom edge.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned off-white document page with a blue FBI “RECEIVED” date stamp near the upper right and a faint rectangular block of handwritten text or typewritten notes in the center; no photograph or diagram visible.*
